description_long: This house features a single-story structure with a prominent gable roof covered in dark shingles. The exterior walls are a combination of light-colored horizontal wooden siding and red brick at the base, giving it a modern yet rustic appearance. Large glass windows and double glass doors dominate the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. Exposed wooden beams and trim frame the windows and doors, adding architectural interest and warmth. The roof extends slightly beyond the walls, providing a modest overhang for weather protection. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for suburban or urban residential settings.
description: A single-story house with a gable roof, large glass windows and doors, and a mix of wood siding and brick base.
description_view_0: Front view showing double glass doors flanked by large windows, wood trim, and brick base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the gable roof and the symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view with a gable roof peak, exposed beams, and no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with large windows and brick base, mirroring the other side.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass doors with wood trim, no steps or porch, modest overhang
